product_overview: ImamKu is a web application that automates season-based prayer scheduling, attendance, swap management, and fee reconciliation for mosque imams. It provides admin tools for generating schedules and reports and a focused imam dashboard for check-ins, swaps, and earning visibility.
core_goals: Allow admins to create and activate a Season and define prayer types for that Season
Automatically generate and maintain a daily schedule for the active Season and let admins assign imams to slots
Enable imams to view upcoming assignments, submit validated attendance with photo proof within a strict time window, and request swaps
Provide a swap marketplace where imams can request and accept shift exchanges with visibility for admins
Calculate fee/earnings for imams based on configurable rules and show transparent earning breakdowns
Send configurable reminders and notifications to imams and allow admins to export schedule and finance reports

features.name: Season & Prayer Type Management
features.description: Admins create Seasons (e.g., Ramadan) and define prayer types that drive schedule generation and available slots.
user_flows: Sign in as Admin -> Create a new Season with start and end dates -> Add or edit prayer types for the Season -> Set the Season as active -> Confirm the active Season is available for scheduling
Sign in as Admin -> Try to create a Season with overlapping dates -> See validation error preventing overlapping Season creation

features.name: Auto Schedule Generation & Assignment
features.description: Admins generate schedule grids for an active Season and assign imams to available prayer slots using rule checks to avoid conflicts.
user_flows: Sign in as Admin -> Generate a blank schedule for the active Season for the full date range -> Review generated slots for each day and prayer type -> Assign an Imam to a specific slot -> Save the schedule and confirm the assigned Imam appears on the schedule
Sign in as Admin -> Assign an Imam to a slot that conflicts with an existing assignment -> See validation preventing the conflicting assignment

features.name: Imam Attendance Check-in
features.description: Imams submit attendance by checking in within a strict time window and uploading a real-time photo as proof of presence.
user_flows: Sign in as Imam -> View upcoming assigned shifts -> Start check-in within the allowed time window (30 minutes before to 30 minutes after) -> Upload a real-time location photo as proof -> Submit attendance -> See attendance recorded as submitted
Sign in as Imam -> Attempt to check-in outside the allowed time window -> See validation error preventing check-in

features.name: Swap Marketplace (Shift Exchange)
features.description: Imams can request swaps for assigned shifts and other imams can accept offers; admin can monitor swap traffic.
user_flows: Sign in as Imam -> View assigned shift you want to release -> Create a swap request specifying the shift to release and the replacement proposition at least H-2 before the prayer -> Publish the swap request -> Another Imam accepts the swap request -> Both Imams see their schedules updated to reflect the exchange
Sign in as Imam -> Create a swap request without providing a valid replacement proposition -> See validation error prompting required replacement details
Sign in as Admin -> View pending swap requests -> Monitor swap status and confirm swapped shifts are reflected in the master schedule

features.name: Fee Configuration & Earnings Dashboard
features.description: Admins configure fee rules and admins/imams can view calculated earnings based on approved attendances.
user_flows: Sign in as Admin -> Configure fee rules for Per Schedule and Flat Per Day options -> Save fee configuration -> Sign in as Imam -> View personal earnings dashboard -> See earnings calculated based on approved attendances and the active fee rules
Sign in as Admin -> Mark a submitted attendance as APPROVED -> Sign in as Imam -> Refresh earnings dashboard -> See the approved attendance included in the updated earnings total

features.name: Notifications & Reminders
features.description: Admins configure reminder timings and broadcast messages; imams receive reminders for upcoming duties.
user_flows: Sign in as Admin -> Create or update reminder configuration with relative times before a scheduled duty (e.g., 60 and 30 minutes) -> Save configuration -> Sign in as Imam -> Observe receipt of reminder messages at configured times before the assignment
Sign in as Admin -> Send a broadcast message to all imams -> Sign in as Imam -> Receive the broadcast message and view it in the in-app notifications feed

features.name: Exports & Reporting
features.description: Admins export schedules, master data, and finance/invoice reports to CSV/Excel for offline reconciliation using streaming exports.
user_flows: Sign in as Admin -> Open the Export hub -> Select dataset type and date range for export -> Generate export -> Download the CSV/Excel file and confirm data matches selected filters
Sign in as Admin -> Attempt to export without selecting a required dataset or date range -> See validation prompt to complete export options

features.name: Imam Dashboard (Schedule, Attendance & Fees)
features.description: Imams see a consolidated dashboard with upcoming schedules, attendance status, swap options, and fee summaries.
user_flows: Sign in as Imam -> See list of upcoming scheduled assignments for the active Season -> Select a scheduled assignment to view details -> From the assignment view choose to check-in or request a swap -> See fee estimate and past attendance history related to that assignment

features.name: Admin Monitoring & Manual Actions
features.description: Admins can review attendance records, approve or reject attendances, monitor swaps, and correct assignments when needed.
user_flows: Sign in as Admin -> Open attendance review list -> Select a submitted attendance record -> Approve or reject the attendance -> See the attendance status update and related fee recalculated if approved
Sign in as Admin -> Open schedule for a given date -> Manually reassign a slot from one Imam to another -> Save changes and confirm both Imams see updated assignments

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Admin functions including managing Imams, Season configurations, prayer times overrides, generating schedules, and exporting data.

features.name: Imam Features
features.description: Imam specific tools: view upcoming schedules, checking attendance, monitoring fees, swapping schedules.

features.name: Notification System
features.description: System for sending push/whatsapp/email notifications contextually, including schedule reminders.

features.name: Fee and Attendance Automation
features.description: Tracking mosque attendance and calculating scheduled fee income dynamically.
